sql: WITH base AS (SELECT ct.net_sol AS net, ct.entry_price_sol AS ep, gm.open_price_sol AS op FROM copy_trades ct JOIN graduations g ON g.mint=ct.mint JOIN graduation_momentum gm ON gm.graduation_id=g.id WHERE ct.strategy_id='copy-hotlead-hold30m' AND ct.status='closed' AND ct.net_sol IS NOT NULL AND gm.open_price_sol>0 AND ct.entry_price_sol>0) SELECT CASE WHEN ep/op<1 THEN 'a_below_open' WHEN ep/op<1.5 THEN 'b_0_50pct' WHEN ep/op<2 THEN 'c_50_100' WHEN ep/op<3 THEN 'd_100_200' WHEN ep/op<5 THEN 'e_200_400' ELSE 'f_ge400' END AS ext_bucket, COUNT(*) AS n, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN net>0 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END),3) AS win_rate, ROUND(SUM(net),3) AS tot_net, ROUND(AVG(net),4) AS avg_net, ROUND(MIN(ep/op),3) AS min_ratio, ROUND(MAX(ep/op),2) AS max_ratio FROM base GROUP BY ext_bucket ORDER BY ext_bucket
